ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "hand_dominance" TEXT /* Dominant hand of the participant (left or right) */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the participant is participating in */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the participant */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the participant with the tasks */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Educational background of the participant */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the lead researcher */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant conducting the trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the trial belongs to */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Number of the trial within the experiment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being performed in the trial */,
  "trial_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trial */,
  "trial_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trial */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Whether the trial was successful */,
  "pause" INTEGER /* Whether the trial was paused */,
  "experimenter_attention" INTEGER /* Whether the experimenter was attentive during the trial */,
  "fitts2_prep" INTEGER /* Whether the Fitts' Law preparation phase was completed */,
  "fitts2_wait" INTEGER /* Whether the Fitts' Law wait phase was completed */,
  "trial_starts" INTEGER /* Whether the trial start was successful */,
  "trial_time" REAL /* Duration of the trial in milliseconds */,
  "glfw_time" REAL /* GLFW time of the trial */,
  "target" TEXT /* Target of the trial */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance to the target */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the target */,
  "target_left" REAL /* Left boundary of the target */,
  "target_right" REAL /* Right boundary of the target */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions of the environment during the trial */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Details of the equipment used during the trial */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the trial */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
